description_en: Las Vegas may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 7 halal restaurants and 4 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Las Vegas, the United States, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Las Vegas: 7+ halal restaurants, 4 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.1/5.
